title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Wavin India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Wavin India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
